judgeReasoning: The response covers all required rubric points: it explains group's role in navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; characterizes /llms-full.txt as monolithic and not split per group; and lists many valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor).
